title: The Inheritance Game
description: Wealthy patriarch Devraj Singhania is found dead in his private library the morning after announcing a complete rewrite of his multi-million dollar will.
briefing: Devraj Singhania's doctor ruled the death a natural heart attack. However, Singhania's daughter believes her father was poisoned. You must investigate the manor, analyze the tea cup residue, and profile the family members who stand to inherit millions.

victim.name: Devraj Singhania
victim.causeOfDeath: Cardiac arrest due to aconite poisoning

suspects.name: Vikram Malhotra
suspects.motive: Devraj discovered Vikram was embezzling from family trusts and was going to remove him from the will execution.

alibi.claimed: I left the manor at 10 PM and returned to my hotel room.

suspects.name: Gayatri Singhania
suspects.motive: Stood to lose most of her share in the proposed new will.

alibi.claimed: I was asleep in my chambers.

objects.name: Devraj's Desk
objects.description: Devraj's desk has a half-empty cup of tea.

forensics.title: Toxicology Report
forensics.conclusion: The cardiac arrest was induced by an aconite dose administered in tea.

solution.method: Aconite poison mixed into chamomile tea

hints: Check the teacup residue on Devraj's desk.
Devraj's heart attack was not natural. Have the coroner check for poison.
